_comment: Deliberately-regressed load summary used to self-test check-baseline.py (Goal T10 Verify: 'a regression is visible against the baseline'). `make load-selftest` asserts the detector FAILS on this input. It breaches every bound at once: latency + error-rate blowout, throughput collapse, a stalled dispatch backlog (drain_seconds -1 = never drained, i.e. the consumer group stopped keeping up), and -- the classic SSE scaling bug -- an unbounded-goroutine leak (residual stays ~740 above idle after every subscriber disconnected, i.e. per-connection cleanup regressed).
